news.headline: Everspin Technologies (NASDAQ: MRAM) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30. Conference call at 5:00 PM Eastern Time.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, Everspin Technologies, Inc., a prominent developer of Magnetoresistive Random Access Memory (MRAM) solutions, will report its Q3 financial results for 2024 after the market closes on October 30, 2024. The company, listed as MRAM on NASDAQ, is set to have Sanjeev Aggarwal, President, and CEO, along with Matt Tenorio, Interim CFO, conduct an earnings conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This announcement aims to inform investors and stakeholders about the company's performance during that quarter.

news.headline: OneSpan Inc. (NASDAQ: OSPN) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 30, 2024, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Boston, OneSpan Inc. (NASDAQ: OSPN) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 post-market close on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the outcomes. Interested parties can tune in via a live webcast on the OneSpan investor relations platform at investors.onespan.com. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the website.

news.headline: Bentley Systems will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024.
news.summary: Bentley Systems, based in Exton, Pennsylvania, is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024. This announcement comes as a key moment for the company to showcase its performance and growth within the specified period. Shareholders and industry analysts are eagerly anticipating the release, hoping to gain insights into Bentley Systems' revenue, profits, and overall market standing during the quarter. This disclosure will provide crucial information for stakeholders to evaluate the company's trajectory and make informed decisions related to their investments.

The investigation is focused on investors who acquired TD Bank stocks. If you have purchased securities from TD Bank and are interested in this investigation, please reach out to...

news.headline: Investors urged to contact firm for investigation into ADMA Biologics Inc (NASDAQ: ADMA) purchases.
news.summary: A law firm in New York, Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC, is currently looking into possible claims for buyers of ADMA Biologics Inc. Investors who acquired securities of ADMA Biologics (NASDAQ: ADMA) should consider seeking further information about the investigation.

news.headline: Investigation launched by law firm Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman on Oct. 16, 2024, regarding possible claims on First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) securities.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC, an attorney advertising firm, announced an investigation into potential claims for investors who bought shares of First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR). The company is looking into possible violations that may have affected purchasers of First Solar securities. Investors who acquired shares of First Solar are advised to participate in the investigation.

news.headline: Investors urged to contact Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC for claims investigation into Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM).
news.summary: A legal firm, Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC, based in New York, is currently looking into potential claims for investors who bought securities of Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM). The investigation focuses on purchasers of Humana stocks, urging them to seek more information on possible claims. The case involves transactions around October 16, 2024, and those affected are advised to consider the legal options available to them.

news.headline: Investigation launched on Shattuck Labs Inc. (NASDAQ: STTK) by law firm, encouraging investors to reach out.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, law firm Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC announced that they are conducting an investigation for investors who bought shares of Shattuck Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: STTK). The investigation pertains to potential claims relating to the company. Investors who purchased securities of Shattuck are advised to participate in the investigation.

news.headline: Direct Digital Holdings (Nasdaq: DRCT) regains Nasdaq compliance, a leading advertising platform.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Houston, Direct Digital Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRCT), a prominent advertising and marketing technology platform, was featured. The company operates through subsidiaries such as Colossus Media, LLC (known as Colossus SSP) and Orange 142, LLC.

news.headline: Innocan Pharma to participate in investor conference in New York & relaunch website for better investor experience.
news.summary: Innocan Pharma Corporation, a leading company in chronic pain management utilizing Liposomal CBD drug products, is set to present at an upcoming event in Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, AB on October 16, 2024. The company, trading under the symbols CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTCQB: INNPF, specializes in this field and aims to showcase its innovations at the event.

news.headline: Global stakeholders shift to circular economy for sustainable future through recycling & reusing. BCC Research study highlights trends.
news.summary: In a move towards sustainable resource management, stakeholders and governments are shifting from a linear economy to a circular one. This transition involves embracing recycling, refurbishing, and reusing. A recent study by BCC Research titled "Circular Economy: A Global Outlook" highlights this trend. The study, conducted in Boston on October 16, 2024, discusses the importance of this shift in maximizing resources efficiently. The focus is on reducing waste and promoting environmental conservation. This global initiative aims to tackle pressing issues such as climate change and resource depletion. Through these strategies, stakeholders and governments are working towards a more sustainable future.

news.headline: Sleep Number Corp (NASDAQ: SNBR) to report Q3 results on Oct 30th, 2024. Conference call at 5pm EDT. Webcast link: https://ir.sleepnumber.com.
news.summary: A press release from Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) indicates that the company is set to announce its fiscal third-quarter results up to September 28, 2024, after the market closes on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. Management will conduct a conference call to discuss the outcomes at 5 p.m. EDT (4 p.m. CDT; 2 p.m. PDT). For those interested, the webcast can be accessed by visiting the investor relations section of the Sleep Number website at https://ir.sleepnumber.com. The replay of the webcast will be available for retrieval.

news.headline: Martin Midstream Partners reports $25.1 million in adjusted EBITDA for Q3 2024; Quarterly cash distribution declared.
news.summary: In Kilgore, Texas, Martin Midstream Partners L.P. (Nasdaq: MMLP) released its financial results for Q3 2024. Bob Bondurant, President and CEO of Martin Midstream GP LLC, the general partner of the Partnership, expressed satisfaction with the quarter's performance. The Partnership reported adjusted EBITDA of $25.1 million, slightly below guidance by $1.3 million.

news.headline: Acrivon Therapeutics granted equity awards to employees under its 2023 Inducement Plan, with stock options awarded on Oct 15, 2024.
news.summary: Watertown, Massachusetts, October 16, 2024 - Acrivon Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical stage precision medicine company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ACRV, has disclosed the approval of equity awards under its 2023 Inducement Plan to selected employees. These awards, given in the form of stock options on October 15, 2024, are part of the company's utilization of the Acrivon Predictive Precision Proteomics (AP3) platform for identifying and developing drug candidates tailored to patients whose conditions are anticipated to be responsive to the particular treatment.

news.headline: Tulikivi forecasts 2024 net sales EUR 33-37M & comparable profit EUR 2-3M, down from previous guidance.
CSX Corp. reports Q3 2024 operating income of $1.35B, net earnings of $894M, with total volume at 1.59M units, up by 3%.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Fla., on October 16, 2024, CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) reported an operating income of $1.35 billion for the third quarter of 2024, up from $1.27 billion in the same period last year. Net earnings reached $894 million, or $0.46 per diluted share, compared to $828 million, or $0.41 per diluted share, in the third quarter of 2023. The total volume for the quarter stood at 1.59 million units, marking a 3% increase from the third quarter of 2023.

news.headline: FFB Bancorp reported Q3 2024 net income of $8.56 million ($2.69 per diluted share), an increase of 6% from the previous quarter. Total assets increased by 16% to $1.51 billion, total loans increased by 11% to $998.22 million, and total deposits increased by 14% to $1.29 billion. Shareholder equity rose 45% to $163.64 million. Pre-tax income was $12.67 million, and return on average equity was 21.11%. The efficiency ratio was 50.16%. Nonperforming assets totaled $12.82 million, and there was a $762,000 provision for credit losses in Q3 2024.
news.summary: FFB Bancorp reported a net income of $8.56 million for Q3 2024, a 6% increase from Q2 2024, with $25.40 million in gross revenue. Total assets grew to $1.51 billion, a 16% increase from last year. The bank saw a 14% increase in deposits to $1.29 billion and a 11% increase in loans to $998.22 million. Shareholder equity rose by 45% to $163.64 million. The bank's tangible common equity ratio was 10.82%, and regulatory leverage capital ratio was 14.35% at the end of Q3 2024. Non-interest income grew by 18% to $22.51 million. The efficiency ratio was at 50.16%. Total employees increased to 163. The bank reported an 11% increase in operating revenue for the nine months ended September 30, 2024. The bank also provided details on asset quality, provisions for credit losses, and delinquent loans. FFB Bancorp's stock price was $90.50. The company's book value per common share increased to $51.51, and the return on average assets was 2.31%.

news.headline: GITEX GLOBAL 2024 addresses cybercrime challenges as "Cybersecurity Day" highlights threats and opportunities for tech community.
news.summary: Halfway through GITEX GLOBAL, "Cybersecurity Day" sheds light on challenges, threats, and opportunities for the global tech community. H.E. Dr. Mohamed Al Kuwaiti, Head of Cybersecurity for the UAE Government, emphasizes the transformative impact of AI. The event took place on October 16 in Dubai, UAE.

news.headline: J&J faces backlash over talc settlement, accused of vote-buying by holdouts amid ongoing legal proceedings.
Tax implications of the 2024 US elections discussed, with a potential increase of 15% in overall tax rates predicted.
Allegheny County high schools hold voter registration drives this week to promote civic engagement. #HighSchoolVoterRegistration
news.summary: Multiple high schools in Allegheny County are participating in voter registration drives this week, as part of the HighSchoolVoterRegistration initiative. Students are taking action to promote democracy by registering eligible voters. This effort aims to increase civic engagement among young people and ensure their voices are heard. The exact number of high schools involved and the total number of individuals registered were not provided. The initiative is crucial in inspiring future generations to participate in the democratic process.

news.headline: Sinopec supports AI in media at 6th World Media Summit in Urumqi, China on Oct. 14, 2024. #AI #MediaTransformation
news.summary: In Urumqi, China, the 6th World Media Summit kicked off on October 14th, 2024, focusing on "Artificial Intelligence and Media Transformation." The event is being organized by Xinhua News Agency and the People's Government of Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region. Notably, Sinopec Corp is also participating in the summit.

news.headline: MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. declares $0.23 quarterly cash dividend on common stock and continues share repurchase program.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCBS) based in Atlanta, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be paid out on November 8, 2024, to shareholders of the Company.

news.headline: SEC restrictions and technical issues resulted in World Liberty Financial selling only 4% of its token allocation for Trump.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial, supported by Donald Trump, has sold merely 4% of its designated tokens up to now. This low uptake raises questions about the project's progress.

news.headline: Tech giants like Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are investing billions in nuclear power for emission-free electricity.
news.summary: Major tech companies are committing billions of dollars towards nuclear energy as a clean energy source for powering artificial intelligence and other operations.

news.headline: Special Olympics CEO joins US delegation at G7 summit in Italy urging for stronger disability inclusion commitments.
news.summary: Mary Davis, the Chief Executive Officer, has become part of the US government delegation attending the inaugural G7 Ministers' Meeting on Inclusion and Disability in Umbria, Italy. This significant event took place from October 14-16, 2024, marking a crucial step towards promoting inclusion and support for individuals with disabilities. This groundbreaking meeting, a first of its kind, gathered representatives from various G7 countries to address key issues related to inclusion and disability.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market trading higher, 96% Bitcoin holders in profit. Bitcoin at $67,883.56, Ethereum at $2,617.07, Dogecoin up 10.2% to $0.1265. Transaction volume up 43.5%, daily active addresses up 10.4%. 53,788 traders liquidated in past 24 hours for $147.29 million. Bitcoin predicted to reach all-time high in 3-4 weeks. Elon Musk's Tesla sent $760M to unknown wallets. Venture capitalist criticizes Gary Gensler as bad crypto regulator.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market has seen a positive trend, with Bitcoin holders experiencing profits, with 96% now in profit. Bitcoin is currently trading at $67,883.56 with a gain of 1.6%, while Ethereum is at $2,617.07, up by 1.3%. Solana is at $154.56 with a slight decrease of 0.15%, Dogecoin is at $0.1265 with a significant increase of 10.2%, and Shiba Inu is at $0.00001869 with a gain of 3.4%.IntoTheBlock data indicates a 43.5% rise in large transaction volume and a 10.4% increase in daily active addresses. Transactions exceeding $100,000 have surged from 9,217 to 9,654 in one day, with exchanges netflows up by 43.8%. Coinglass data reveals that 53,788 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $147.29 million.Bitcoin is currently dominating the market at 58.8%, the highest since 2021, and experts suggest it may reach 60% dominance before an altcoin season commences.In recent developments, Elon Musk's Tesla reportedly transferred $760 million to unknown wallets, causing speculation. Additionally, a venture capitalist criticized Gary Gensler as the 'Worst Crypto Regulator Ever' and highlighted potential impacts on the upcoming elections. More details on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kearney Consumer Institute: US consumer stress up (+1.5 points) in Q3 2024, China stress increased (+2.6 points), Japan dropped (-3.4 points) in index.
news.summary: Optimism regarding the political future of the United States increased by 5% in the third quarter of the year. The U.S. Consumer Stress Index also rose by 1.5 points compared to the second quarter of 2024. China experienced the largest increase in stress levels, with a significant rise of 2.6 points, while Japan witnessed the most significant decrease in stress levels, with a substantial drop of 3.4 points. These changes indicate a noticeable shift in perceptions and sentiments across these nations.

news.headline: NVIDIA partners with Google Cloud to combine NVIDIA NIM and Google Kubernetes Engine for scalable AI inference via Google Cloud Marketplace.
news.summary: NVIDIA has partnered with Google Cloud to combine NVIDIA NIM with Google Kubernetes Engine, enabling the provision of scalable AI inference solutions via Google Cloud Marketplace. This collaboration aims to cater to the growing demand for AI services, leveraging the strengths of both companies. Through this integration, users can access advanced AI capabilities seamlessly, enhancing their overall computing experiences.

news.headline: SynthBee, Inc. secures $20M seed funding for enterprise productivity innovation with a focus on security and precision. Founded by Rony Abovitz.
news.summary: Founded by entrepreneur Rony Abovitz, SynthBee is striving to revolutionize enterprise productivity through a secure, precise, and innovative approach. The company emphasizes safety, transparency, and scalability while safeguarding intellectual property and unique expertise. Abovitz, known for his successful ventures, leads the charge in this endeavor.

news.headline: Nokia is accelerating into a merger with Infinera, offering telecom solutions for all networks incl. 5G. Normalizing business faces challenges with spending slowdowns. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Nokia Oyj, a global provider of telecom equipment and network solutions, offers services for mobile, cloud, and optical networks. They are a pioneer in 5G deployment and will play a key role in 6G rollout by 2030. The company faces challenges due to macroeconomic pressures on telecom operators impacting spending. In the second quarter of 2024, Nokia's business is still normalizing, with tough year-over-year comparisons. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EvoShield is partnering with UVA baseball for uniforms & apparel, creating 7 looks for 2025 season.
news.summary: EvoShield® has entered a significant partnership with the University of Virginia baseball program to provide NCAA Division I college baseball uniforms and apparel. Under this new agreement, the Cavaliers will showcase seven distinct uniform designs for the 2025 season. Coach Brian O’Connor collaborated with EvoShield designers to craft these new looks, including an innovative uniform combination that the team will debut in the upcoming season. This collaboration marks an exciting development for EvoShield in the collegiate baseball realm, highlighting their commitment to innovative sports apparel design.

news.headline: Manga artist Acky Bright hosts live drawing at New York Comic Con 2024 after "WcDonald's" campaign in 30+ countries.
news.summary: In October 16, 2024, McDonald's locations in North America and over 30 countries globally underwent a unique transition to "WcDonald's" as part of a February 2024 campaign. This initiative included manga-themed packaging and a digital manga series. The campaign garnered attention due to its innovative approach, reaching a wide audience across various countries.

news.headline: September retail sales report, key for economic growth, expected to show 0.3% uptick, with potential for 0.8% increase.
news.summary: This Thursday at 8:30 a.m. ET, the retail sales report for September will be released, providing insight into household spending in the final month of the third quarter. Analysts project a 0.3% month-over-month increase, compared to the 0.1% rise in August. Bank of America predicts an even stronger performance, with retail sales potentially rising by 0.8%. Economist Aditya Bhave anticipates gains of 0.7% to 0.8% for retail sales excluding autos and the core control group. The report is expected to reflect continued strong economic growth driven by consumer spending.

news.headline: Trader transforms $5K into $1.5M by betting on GOAT meme coin linked to AI chatbot's thoughts. #CryptoSuccess
news.summary: A particularly successful trader on Solana recently earned significant profits by investing in GOAT, a meme coin inspired by an AI chatbot.

news.headline: Robert Telles sentenced for journalist Jeff German's murder, National Press Club praises ruling as victory for press freedom.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Emily Wilkins, the president of the National Press Club, released a statement regarding the sentencing of Robert Telles for the murder of journalist Jeff German. This important development highlights a significant win for press freedom and serves as a stark reminder that...

news.headline: Nu Skin focuses on innovation for growth, with launch of MYND360 for cognitive well-being. Hopes to offset economic challenges.
news.summary: Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. is focusing on growth strategies with key initiatives to enhance market presence and tap into high-growth sectors. They recently launched MYND360, a line of six clinically validated nutritional formulas aimed at cognitive well-being, catering to stress management, focus, memory enhancement, and better sleep. Despite macroeconomic challenges, Nu Skin is benefiting from product launches like Ageloc, Wellspa IO, and RenewspA IO. The company's focus on beauty devices and innovations in the brain health market have shown positive results. Their Rhyz business is a key driver of growth, contributing significantly to revenue. Nu Skin's strategic vision includes a focus on Products, Programs, and Platforms to maintain growth momentum.

Kalshi election betting contracts soar with over 12 political event contracts certified post-court victory in September.
news.summary: Over a dozen political event contracts have been officially approved by the prediction marketplace after winning a legal dispute in September.

news.headline: Nasdaq 100 futures holdings dip by $6B post ASML chip sell-off.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that approximately 25% of adults in the United States are facing financial difficulties due to the ongoing economic challenges. The research also highlighted that 35% of households have reported a decrease in income, with 18% experiencing job loss. Additionally, 42% of respondents expressed concerns about their ability to pay rent or mortgage in the coming months. The study emphasized the urgent need for government assistance and support programs to aid those struggling financially.

news.headline: Investors eye potential rally in Walgreens (WBA) stock at 33% of 52-week high. Similar case with Carvana saw over 10x increase in share price, hinting at double-digit upside. Stock could surge with a major announcement on the horizon.
news.summary: The article discusses the potential opportunity for investors in Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc. (NASDAQ: WBA) stock, which is currently trading at 33% of its 52-week high. The stock is seen as having the potential for a double-digit upside in the coming quarters. The article references the example of Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA), which faced similar challenges and saw a tenfold increase in its stock price after the company made the right moves. The article hints at a potential catalyst that could lead to a rally in Walgreens stock sooner than expected. The full story is available on Benzinga.com, where investors are betting on a surge in Walgreens stock ahead of an anticipated major announcement.

news.headline: Nokia Corp bought back its own stocks on 16.10.2024.
Analyst warns Bitcoiners of potential final dip before another leg up, stay cautious.
news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.6%, which is the lowest it has been in over 50 years. This decrease in unemployment has been attributed to strong job growth, with the economy adding 568,000 jobs in the past month alone. Additionally, the number of millionaires in the country has reached a record high of 11.4 million, with their combined wealth totaling $41 trillion. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of various government policies and recovery efforts following the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic.

news.headline: Bank executive Erica Khalili emphasizes need for clear regulations for banks entering crypto amidst challenging times in digital banking.
news.summary: Ericica Khalili, a top executive at Lead Bank, discusses the challenges currently facing the digital banking industry. She highlights the complexities of the sector at this time, emphasizing the difficulties that institutions are encountering. Khalili underscores that the industry is experiencing significant hurdles, indicating a challenging landscape.

news.headline: Emerging AI-blockchain sector attracts VC funding for Wire Network, OpenGradient, Blockcast, Apex Fusion, PiP World, and Lombard.
news.summary: In the latest venture capital roundup, several tech startups secured funding. The Wire Network, OpenGradient, Blockcast, Apex Fusion, PiP World, and Lombard were among the companies that received investments. The total amount of funding raised by these startups was not disclosed. This news was highlighted in a recent report from a reputable online publication specializing in cryptocurrency and blockchain technology news.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs arm in discussions to aid Northvolt's crisis with a potential investment.
Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB, SOL, XRP, DOGE, TON, ADA, AVAX, SHIB under scrutiny; BTC aims $70k, caution urged for selloff risks.
news.summary: Investors in the cryptocurrency market are eagerly eyeing a potential surge in Bitcoin to reach $70,000. However, there are concerns that a sell-off at this price level could lead to a significant decline in both Bitcoin (BTC) and alternative cryptocurrencies (altcoins). This price point represents a critical juncture for the market, with many closely monitoring the behavior of Bitcoin and its potential impact on the broader cryptocurrency landscape.
